Bus Timings

Abu Dhabi X5 Bus Timings from Corniche Hospital to Al Maqta Bus Interchange

December 26, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

The Abu Dhabi public transportation system offers a seamless and efficient way to navigate the city, with the X5 bus route standing out for its connectivity between key locations. The X5 bus travels from Corniche Hospital to Al Maqta Bus Interchange, providing residents and visitors with easy access to essential services, shopping centers, and cultural landmarks.

Operational Details

The X5 bus operates with a consistent schedule throughout the day, ensuring convenient service for commuters. Below are the key timings for the X5 bus departing from both Corniche Hospital and Al Maqta Bus Interchange:

From Corniche Hospital From Al Maqta Bus Interchange
05:19 05:28
05:49 05:58
06:17 06:29
06:47 06:59
07:13 07:28
07:43 07:58
08:16 08:28
08:46 08:58
09:16 09:28
09:46 09:58
10:15 10:28
10:45 10:58
11:14 11:28
11:44 11:58
12:13 12:28
12:43 12:58
13:14 13:28
13:44 13:58
14:14 14:28
14:44 14:58
15:16 15:28
15:46 15:58
16:15 16:28
16:45 16:58
17:11 17:28
17:41 17:58
18:12 18:28
18:42 18:58
19:13 19:28
19:43 19:58
20:16 20:28
20:46 20:58
21:18 21:28
21:48 21:58
22:20 22:29
22:50 22:59

Bus X5 Timetable

For complete schedules, passengers can visit the official AD Mobility website or refer to this link for X5 Bus Timings.

Ticket Pricing: Travel on the X5 bus route requires a Hafilat Card, Abu Dhabi’s cashless payment system. The fare is AED 2 for one zone, with an extra AED 0.05 per kilometer for longer distances. Passengers can quickly top up their cards online or at kiosks around the city, making for a hassle-free, cashless travel experience.

Route Overview

The X5 bus route traverses various important locations, offering passengers a glimpse into the vibrant life of Abu Dhabi. Below is a complete list of stops along this route:

  1. Corniche Hospital The starting point, providing healthcare services to the community.

  2. Al Mina Street A bustling street lined with shops and eateries.

  3. Zayed The First Street A major road that connects various districts of the city.

4.

  1. Al Khabiyah Street A residential area with local amenities.

  2. Fatima Bint Mubarak Street Another key local street for residents.

  3. Gold Center A popular shopping destination known for jewelry.

  4. Mariam Bint Said Mosque A spiritual landmark for the community.

  5. Abu Dhabi Bus Station A major hub for public transport in the city.

  6. Mohamed Bin Khalifa Street A vital road with access to various services.

  7. Abu Dhabi Men’s College An educational institution serving local students.

  8. Police College A facility focused on law enforcement training.

  9. Rabdan Street A street providing access to residential areas.

  10. Dhafeer Street Another road that connects to local neighborhoods.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Saif Ghobash Street A busy thoroughfare with shops and services.

  2. Al Noor Hospital A healthcare facility catering to various medical needs.

17.

  1. Al Maqta Bus Interchange The final stop, facilitating transfers to other routes.

Some other Abu Dhabi bus routes you can check out include the 210 bus route, which runs from Al Shahama Bus Station to Dalma Mall, and the 420 route, which travels from LifeCare Hospital to Shakhbout City.

Accessibility and Services

The buses feature:

  • Ramps for wheelchair access.

  • Designated seating for individuals with mobility challenges.
  • Audio-visual aids to assist passengers with hearing or vision impairments.

This commitment to inclusivity ensures that everyone can enjoy a comfortable journey on the X5 route.

Nearby Attractions and Landmarks

  1. Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque: One of the largest mosques in the world, known for its stunning architecture and serene ambiance, making it a must-visit site for tourists.

  2. Electra Park: A local park that offers a peaceful environment for families and individuals to unwind.

  3. Gold Center: A hub for jewelry enthusiasts looking for exquisite pieces.

Journey Experience

On a recent trip on the X5 bus from Corniche Hospital to Al Maqta Bus Interchange, passengers enjoyed a scenic view of Abu Dhabi’s urban landscape. The journey began near the beautiful Corniche beach and continued along Zayed The First Street, showcasing Electra Park, a green oasis in the city.

Stops at Al Noor Hospital and the Abu Dhabi Men’s College connected the community to essential services and education. The trip concluded at Al Maqta Bus Interchange, enhancing accessibility throughout the city.

Travel Tips for Bus X5

  • Plan Ahead: Check the bus timings to minimize waiting times, especially during peak hours.

  • Use the Hafilat Smart Card: This enables quick, cashless payments on all Abu Dhabi buses.
  • Monitor Bus Updates: Utilize the AD Mobility app for real-time updates on schedules and routes.
  • Avoid Peak Times: For a more comfortable journey, try to travel outside of busy periods.

The X5 bus route provides a dependable and convenient way to travel between Corniche Hospital and Al Maqta Bus Interchange.

Whether you’re commuting to work, visiting the mosque, or exploring the local area, the X5 guarantees a smooth and affordable journey through central Abu Dhabi. Ride the X5 bus and effortlessly uncover the city’s vibrant neighborhoods and cultural sites! Don’t forget to check out the complete list of bus routes available in Abu Dhabi for more travel options!

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: December 26, 2025.
